accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: [REQUIRED - USER PROVIDES IMPLICITLY] Users will say things like "Log visit for Apollo Hospitals" or "Document meeting at Manipal" - they will NOT provide IDs. WHAT TO DO: Extract clinic/hospital name from user message and use Account Name field instead (recommended). ONLY USE THIS if user explicitly says "Account ID is 001A0000001ABC" or similar exact 15-18 char format. Either Account ID or Account Name required (Account Name is 99% of the time).

accountName.title: Account Name
accountName.description: [REQUIRED - EXTRACT FROM USER MESSAGE] PRIMARY METHOD: Users naturally mention clinic/hospital names like "I visited Apollo Hospitals today" or "Met with Manipal team". EXTRACT: The clinic/hospital/organization name from user conversation. EXAMPLES: "Discussed partnership with AIIMS" → Extract "AIIMS", "Visited Dr. Mehta at Fortis Hospital" → Extract "Fortis Hospital". ⚠️ CRITICAL - PERSON NAMES WILL FAIL: If user only mentions a person name like "I met with Roopa R" or "Visited Dr. Mehta" (NO hospital name), put that name in Doctor/Provider Contact field INSTEAD, and ask user which clinic they visited. WILL FAIL: "Roopa R", "Dr. Mehta", "Dr. Sharma" (person names). WILL WORK: "Apollo Hospitals", "AIIMS", "Fortis Hospital" (organization names). Either Account Name or Account ID required (this is the most common path).

createTask.title: Create Follow-up Task
createTask.description: [AGENT DECISION - NO ASK] Analyze conversation: if user mentions action items ("call them", "schedule meeting", "follow up", "remind me to send email"), set TRUE. Otherwise FALSE. IMPORTANT: "Remind me to send email" = CREATE TASK (not email action). Smart default: FALSE.

doctorContact.title: Doctor/Provider Contact
doctorContact.description: [OPTIONAL - LOOKUP CONTACT NAME] If user mentions a doctor name, provide it here (e.g., "Roopa R", "Dr. Mehta", "Dr. Sharma, Chief of Cardiology"). SYSTEM VALIDATES: Agent will search for this contact in your Salesforce database. If not found, action fails with "Contact not found" - ask user to verify the exact name. FORMAT: Person name only. Leave blank if not mentioned.

expenseAmount.title: Expense Amount
expenseAmount.description: [OPTIONAL - ASK IF MENTIONED] If user mentions expenses, ask for total amount. FORMAT: Number only like "1500" for 1500 INR. Leave blank if none.

referralNotes.title: Referral Notes
referralNotes.description: [OPTIONAL - ASK IF RELEVANT] If user discusses opportunities or commitments, ask for details. EXAMPLES: "Interested in oncology pilot", "Budget approved Q3". Leave blank if none.

taskDescription.title: Task Description
taskDescription.description: [OPTIONAL - CAPTURE DETAILS] If user provides more context about the task, include it. Otherwise leave blank. Task works fine with just the Subject.

taskDueDate.title: Task Due Date
taskDueDate.description: [OPTIONAL - AUTO-POPULATE] DEFAULT: Use today+3 days automatically (standard 3-day follow-up). ONLY override if user says different date needed ("need this done by next week", etc).

taskPriority.title: Task Priority
taskPriority.description: [OPTIONAL - AUTO-POPULATE] DEFAULT: Always use "Normal" (most follow-ups are routine). ONLY use "High" if user emphasizes urgency or large opportunity. Never use "Low".

taskSubject.title: Task Subject
taskSubject.description: [REQUIRED IF createTask=TRUE - ASK USER] Only ask if task needed. WRITE: Get specific action from user like "Call Dr. Patel", "Send email to Dr. Patel", "Call hospital about pricing". IMPORTANT: If user says "remind me to send email", capture it as a TASK with subject like "Send email to [contact name]" - do NOT send email directly. Format: Action verb + recipient/details. DO NOT make up task subjects - use exact user intent.

visitDate.title: Visit Date
visitDate.description: [OPTIONAL - AUTO-POPULATE] DEFAULT: Use today automatically. ONLY ask user if they mention a past visit date. FORMAT: YYYY-MM-DD if user specifies.

visitSummary.title: Visit Summary
visitSummary.description: [OPTIONAL - ASK IF AVAILABLE] Ask user what was discussed if this is a real visit (1-2 sentences). EXAMPLES: "Discussed oncology program", "Explored cardiology partnership". If user prefers not to provide details, leave blank - system will auto-generate default.
